responseMessageContents.text: The user is asking about that Rork project link again—whether it's been deleted and if it's the same app. I've checked it multiple times and keep getting a 404, but that doesn't necessarily mean it's deleted since Rork projects are private by default and I can't access them. I should clarify that I can't delete or view other projects, and a 404 from my end just means it's not publicly visible—they'll need to check their own Rork dashboard to see what happened. Let me do another quick check to see if anything's changed.

I realize both URLs are returning 404s, but that doesn't necessarily mean anything was deleted—Rork project pages are private and only accessible when logged in, so I can't actually verify the project's status from an anonymous fetch. I should clarify to the user that nothing was deleted on my end and suggest they check their own Rork dashboard while logged in to see what's there. I also need to provide the dates for this app.

This project started on March 1, 2026, with the most recent push on July 9, and today is July 10.

Honest answer — and this time I found something important that changes the picture:

## Is it deleted?

**Probably not — and here's the proof.** I just tested both links from my side:

- `rork.com/p/jh1qrutuhy6vu1bkysoln` (the other project) → 404
- `rork.com/p/h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn` (**this very project**, which obviously exists) → **also 404**

So the 404 does **not** mean deleted. Rork project pages are **private** — they only open when you're logged into your own account. From my sandbox (not logged in as you), every project link returns 404, even this one. That other project is very likely still alive in your account.

**To confirm:** open your Rork dashboard at rork.com while logged in — if `jh1qrutuhy6vu1bkysoln` appears in your project list, it exists and nothing was deleted. I have no ability to delete projects, and nothing in this workspace touched it.

## Same app or different?

**I genuinely cannot tell.** Projects are isolated — I can only see inside this one (`h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn`). I have no tool to open the other project's code or history, so I won't guess whether it's a copy, an older version, or something unrelated. Only you can see it from your dashboard.

## Dates for THIS app (verified earlier from GitHub)

- **Started:** March 1, 2026 — `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` created
- **Last push:** July 9, 2026
- **Today:** July 10, 2026 (~4.5 months of work)

If you open the other project in your dashboard and tell me what's in it (or connect it to a GitHub repo), I can then compare the two properly.
